description: Composition Black round neck dress made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, a bow on the left shoulder, a concealed zipper on the left side, flaring pin-tucks at the back yoke and neat ruffles from the midriff to the hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Hand wash or machine wash cold Mild detergent only Dry in shade Do not bleach jealous 21 have come up with this form fitting dress with innovative design details, crafted to make you stand out from the crowd. Style this with a glitzy party clutch, pointy toed pumps and you're good to go! For a less glam occasion, wear this with tights and closed toe pumps. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
